'''Yo'gand''' was a legendary [[Warmaster]] and the first [[Supreme Overlord]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Biography==
===Warrior===
{{Quote|The Yuuzhan Vong had embarked on a nomadic lifestyle following the ancient Cremlevian War, in which Supreme Overlord Yo'gand defeated Warmaster Steng by dropping a moon on his encampment.|Voren Na'al|<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>}}
Yo'gand was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]], a race of previously docile [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] who had repulsed a machine empire from their [[Yuuzhan'tar|ancestral homeworld]] and subsequently embarked on a centuries long conflict known as the [[Cremlevian War]]. Clans and tribes of Yuuzhan Vong battled one another across [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|the galaxy]], vying for primacy. Yo'gand fought in the war, earning the rank of [[General/Legends|general]]. He came to be revered as a mighty warrior,<ref name="njosb8">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref> fighting rival tribes on the frontlines.<ref name="vp">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref> Eventually, Yo'gand became a [[warmaster]],<ref name="csweIII191">{{CSWECite|III|191}}</ref> leading the [[Warrior caste|warriors]] of his clan into battle.<ref name="njosb8" />

There came a moment in the war when the forces of Yo'gand were competing directly with those of [[Steng]] for dominance of the galaxy.<ref name="dw">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref> A rival warmaster, Steng had situated his forces on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ygziir]],<ref name="TNEC" /> where many of the leaders of the most powerful tribe in opposition to Yo'gand were present. In order to eliminate his enemies, Yo'gand made use of an innovative tactic. He infiltrated a powerful [[dovin basal]]—a Yuuzhan Vong creature capable of manipulating gravity—on to the surface of Ygziir. The dovin basal was subsequently tasked with focusing the planet's gravitic field onto a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of Ygziir. Once the moon had been ensnared by the dovin basal's gravitic manipulation, it was dragged down toward Ygziir,<ref name="vp" /> impacting directly upon Steng's encampment.<ref name="TNEC" /> Ygziir was left a shattered hulk following the collision,<ref name="cswe353">{{CSWECite|III|353}}</ref> which wiped out the opposition leaders.<ref name="vp" />

Steng's flesh was carefully preserved to be worn by the Supreme Overlords of the Yuuzhan Vong. Yo'gand was the first to claim the rank officially,<ref name="dw" /> although the Cremlevian War had been motivated at times by the pretensions of would-be Supreme Overlords. With the Yuuzhan Vong finally united in the ruins of their galaxy, they embarked on a journey into the [[Intergalactic Void]] in such of a new home, traveling aboard planet-sized [[Koros-Strohna|worldships]] for millennia.<ref name="njosb8" />

===Legacy===
Credited with unifying the Yuuzhan Vong, Yo'gand entered into legend as a skilled and redoubtable warrior. Such was Yo'gand's reputation that the [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] of [[Yun-Harla]], the mysterious Yuuzhan Vong Goddess of Trickery, were said to be the only remaining parts of Yo'gand.<ref name="njosb8" /> In the minds of Yuuzhan Vong warriors, Yo'gand represented the pinnacle of martial prowess and achievement.<ref name="tuf">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

During their millennia long trek across the intergalactic void, the Yuuzhan Vong eventually descended once more into disunity. Rivalry among domains and castes led to the fraying of Yuuzhan Vong society to an extent.<ref name="tuf" /> Although scouting missions led to the conclusion that a [[The galaxy/Legends|new galaxy]] had been discovered, the worldships eventually began to deteriorate, leading to further discontentment aboard the worldships.<ref name="dw" /> Factions contended and betrayed one another for the favor of Supreme Overlord Quoreal, until [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]], the figurehead of [[Domain Jamaane]], [[Jamaane coup|usurped]] and killed Quoreal in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].<ref name="tuf" />

As when Yo'gand had defeated Steng, unity was restored to the Yuuzhan Vong following the death of Quoreal. The invasion of the galaxy commenced in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. [[Yo'gand's Core]] was successfully applied by [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Da'Gara]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], using it to destroy the planet [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]]. Kalarba was also destroyed by the tactic.

In the [[The New Essential Chronology|text]] of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]' history, compiled millennia after Yo'gand's life, he was described as the [[Supreme Overlord]] of the Yuuzhan Vong at the time of his defeat of Steng. [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]], the historian who compiled the document,<ref name="TNEC" /> erred in his description, as Yo'gand was a warmaster during the Cremlevian War,<ref name="csweIII191" /> only assuming the position of Supreme Overlord following its denouement.<ref name="dw" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yo'gand did not receive an individual entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], although he was mentioned in the entries for the Cremlevian War, Steng, Ygziir and Yo'gand's Core.
